headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Generac Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $248
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Julien Dumoulin-Smith   maintains Generac Holdings (NYSE:GNRC) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $260 to $248.

headline: Needham Reiterates Buy on Generac Holdings, Maintains $277 Price Target
